dataset_scope.warning: Single public sample episode; these extension probes validate task design and pipeline mechanics, not cross-episode generalization.

baselines.minimal: Ridge classifiers/regressors/projections plus cosine retrieval on the committed feature tensor.
baselines.neural_mlp: Small one-hidden-layer PyTorch MLP heads using the same inputs, targets, chronological split, and evaluator.

body_motion_intensity.name: Body and Hand Motion Intensity
body_motion_intensity.case_study: A window with a fast reach or pour should be classified as high motion; a steady holding window should be low motion.
body_motion_intensity.input: Current non-mocap feature blocks: video, AAC audio, depth, camera pose/rotation, IMU, SLAM, calibration, and language context.
body_motion_intensity.middle_process: Compute the target from hand/body joint changes between neighboring windows, hide the mocap blocks from the input, then classify high versus low motion using the train-set median as the threshold.
body_motion_intensity.minimal_baseline: Ridge classifier on standardized non-mocap features.
body_motion_intensity.neural_baseline: One-hidden-layer MLP binary classifier on the same input features.
body_motion_intensity.current_limit: This is a motion-energy proxy, not a SMPL/MANO body model or a generative motion prior.

multi_view_consistency_retrieval.name: Multi-View Consistency Retrieval
multi_view_consistency_retrieval.case_study: Given the fisheye camera features for a pouring moment, retrieve the synchronized stereo-left view from the same time window.
multi_view_consistency_retrieval.input: Query side: fisheye_cam0 video feature block. Candidate side: stereo_left video feature block from held-out windows.
multi_view_consistency_retrieval.middle_process: Learn a projection from one camera-view feature space into another, then rank held-out candidate windows by cosine similarity.
multi_view_consistency_retrieval.output: Ranked candidate windows; the correct synchronized view should rank near the top.
multi_view_consistency_retrieval.minimal_baseline: Ridge projection followed by cosine nearest-neighbor retrieval.
multi_view_consistency_retrieval.neural_baseline: One-hidden-layer MLP projection followed by the same cosine retrieval evaluator.
multi_view_consistency_retrieval.current_limit: This checks calibrated multi-view signal, but it is still feature retrieval, not NeRF, Gaussian Splatting, or novel-view synthesis.

action_phase_progress.name: Action Phase Progress Estimation
action_phase_progress.case_study: Inside a Pour coffee action segment, estimate whether the current window is near the beginning, middle, or end of that action.
action_phase_progress.input: Current non-caption multimodal feature vector, so the label text cannot be copied directly from the language block.
action_phase_progress.middle_process: Convert contiguous action-label runs into a normalized 0-to-1 progress target, train on earlier windows, and regress progress for later windows.
action_phase_progress.output: A scalar progress value between 0.0 and 1.0 for the current action segment.
action_phase_progress.minimal_baseline: Ridge regressor on standardized non-caption features.
action_phase_progress.neural_baseline: One-hidden-layer MLP regressor on the same input features.
action_phase_progress.current_limit: This is an action-structure probe inside one episode, not a general intent model across homes, people, or tasks.

ego_motion_forecast.name: Short-Horizon Ego-Motion Forecasting
ego_motion_forecast.case_study: From the current sensors, predict how the camera translation will change over the next 20 frames while the wearer moves through the scene.
ego_motion_forecast.input: Current multimodal features excluding the camera-translation block and caption text.
ego_motion_forecast.middle_process: Build a future target from camera-translation difference at a four-window horizon, then regress that future ego-motion delta from current sensors.
ego_motion_forecast.minimal_baseline: Ridge regressor with a 20-frame forecast horizon.
ego_motion_forecast.neural_baseline: One-hidden-layer MLP regressor with the same horizon and split.
ego_motion_forecast.current_limit: This is a compact world-model proxy; it does not build a persistent map, scene graph, or object permanence model.

body_motion_intensity.target_source: hand/body joint delta between neighboring windows

action_phase_progress.target_source: normalized position inside contiguous action-label runs

ego_motion_forecast.target_source: future minus current camera_translation feature block
